name: Café Keeper
short_description: Immerse yourself in the exciting world of managing a cafe, where every detail matters! At the heart of the story is a person who decides to open their own cafe. Your task is not only to manage the business but also to create a unique cafe that will attract customers
detailed_description:
Cook dishes from original recipes, create new culinary masterpieces, develop your menu, and optimize processes to make your cafe the most popular in town! But beyond that, it’s important to track the development of the characters — the fate of the cafe directly depends on their journey.

Game Features:

  • A deep storyline with elements of family drama and career choices.

  • Menu creation and improvement — unlock new recipes and choose the best dishes for your cafe.

  • Cafe management — from planning the menu to improving the cafe.

  • A unique gameplay experience combining culinary skills, business economics, and strategic thinking.

Immerse yourself in the cafe atmosphere, where every decision you make can affect the future of your business and the fate of the characters. Are you ready to uncover all the secrets of a successful cafe?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Russian, Ukrainian
